# AGENTS.md — ePub and VTT to LLM

## Project Overview

Given .epub and .vtt files, train and infer a new LLM.

- **Repo:** [GeiserX/epub-and-vtt-to-llm](https://github.com/GeiserX/epub-and-vtt-to-llm)
- **Language:** Python
- **License:** GPL-3.0

## Security

> **Do not commit secrets to the repository.**
